name: Pancakes (Prodigy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients together into a bowl.
2. In another bowl, beat the egg, oil, and milk until combined.
3. Stir the wet mixture into the dry mixture until just smooth.
4. Grease a large skillet or griddle.
5. Pour batter onto the hot griddle (about 3 pancakes fit).
6. Cook until bubbles form on the surface of the pancake (2-3 minutes).
7. Flip with a spatula and cook the other side until browned, about 1 1/2 to 2 minutes.
Makes 3 Servings (6 4-inch pancakes)
